fromSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_requests, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acs_req_status = 'completed') * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) ELSE 0 END AS success_rate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(acs_req_duration_ms) FILTER (WHERE acs_req_status = 'completed')), 0) AS avg_duration_ms, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mt_acs_execution_log WHERE acs_log_safety_triggered = true AND tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}), 0) AS safety_triggers, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acs_req_status = 'blocked') AS pending_approvals, COALESCE(SUM(acs_req_total_cost), 0) AS total_cost FROM mt_acs_demo_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId}

description: Risk level distribution for pie chart
fromSql: SELECT acs_req_risk_level AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM mt_acs_demo_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND acs_req_risk_level IS NOT NULL GROUP BY acs_req_risk_level ORDER BY label

description: Request status distribution for bar chart
fromSql: SELECT acs_req_status AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mt_acs_demo_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY acs_req_status ORDER BY count DESC

description: Safety valve trigger trend over 30 days
fromSql: SELECT DATE(acs_log_timestamp) AS date, COUNT(*) AS trigger_count FROM mt_acs_execution_log WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND acs_log_safety_triggered = true AND acs_log_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY DATE(acs_log_timestamp) ORDER BY date

SELECT acs_req_category AS category, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acs_req_status = 'completed') AS success, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acs_req_status = 'failed') AS failed FROM mt_acs_demo_request WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND acs_req_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY acs_req_category ORDER BY (COUNT(*)) DESC

description: Most recent 10 execution log entries for ACP showcase dashboard
fromSql: SELECT acs_log_timestamp AS log_time, acs_log_layer AS layer, acs_log_action_type AS action_type, acs_log_status AS status, acs_log_risk_level AS risk_level, acs_log_safety_triggered AS safety_triggered, acs_log_duration_ms AS duration_ms FROM mt_acs_execution_log WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} ORDER BY acs_log_timestamp DESC LIMIT 10
